name: io.github.IvanBBaev/instagram-mcp-ai
description: MCP server for the Instagram Platform (Meta Graph API) — professional-account tools.

environmentVariables.name: IG_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Long-lived Instagram access token for the professional account.

environmentVariables.name: IG_ACCOUNT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Instagram professional-account ID; skips a lookup and disambiguates when several accounts are reachable.

environmentVariables.name: IG_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Meta app ID; enables token exchange/refresh, appsecret_proof, and business discovery.

environmentVariables.name: IG_APP_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Meta app secret; required alongside IG_APP_ID for token refresh and appsecret_proof.
